federation.title: Federation
federation.subtitle: Fleet-of-fleets: monitor other Open Fleet Control dashboards, with per-remote opt-in write actions
federation.emptyText: Add another Open Fleet Control dashboard's URL below to watch its fleet — mesh health, kanban flow, evolution gate, and alerts — from a single pane of glass.
federation.tokenHint: HTTPS only. The token is stored server-side and never displayed again.
federation.loadError: Failed to load federation state: {message}. Retrying automatically...
federation.writeNote: Remotes are read-only by default. Write actions (lesson approve/reject, gate, task move) are a per-remote opt-in via the WRITES badge on each card.
federation.crossTailnetNote: Cross-tailnet access works via Tailscale node sharing — see
federation.writesOnTitle: Write actions enabled — click to disable
federation.writesOffTitle: Read-only — click to enable write actions
federation.noPendingLessons: No pending lessons on this remote.
federation.confirmEnableWrites:
Enable write actions against "{name}"?

This dashboard will be able to approve/reject lessons, toggle the evolution gate, and move tasks ON THE REMOTE dashboard. Every action is audited on both sides under your identity. Only enable this for remotes you operate and trust.
federation.drillNoData: No detail cached from this remote yet. It appears after the first successful poll.
federation.drillUnreachable: Remote currently unreachable — showing last-known cached detail.
federation.writesHint: Read-only remote. Use “Enable writes” to allow lesson approve/reject, gate toggle, and kanban task moves against this dashboard (audited on both sides).

tokens.title: Tokens & Cost
tokens.subtitle: Token totals across 24h / 3d / 7d windows with a per-model breakdown
tokens.noModelData: No model data for this window
tokens.loadError: Could not reach the cost-breakdown API — is the server up?
tokens.honestyNote: Costs marked EST are computed locally from token counts and public per-model rates; REPORTED costs come straight from provider usage records. Cache reads are billed at a steep discount and cache writes at a premium, so they are shown separately and never lumped into raw input/output totals.

settings.gateDefault: Gate new lessons by default (require approval before adoption)
settings.intervalsHint: Allowed range: 5 seconds to 1 hour. Interval changes take effect after a service restart.
settings.ntfyHint: The topic name is the only access control on ntfy.sh — treat it like a secret. "Send test alert" fires through the saved server-side config, so save first.
settings.secretPrompt: New HMAC secret for {url} (write-only, never displayed again):
settings.subtitle: Alerts, sinks, poll intervals, and the validation gate — persisted to config/dashboard.local.json
settings.title: Settings
settings.webhookHint: Secrets are write-only: stored server-side, never displayed again. Webhook changes apply immediately (no separate save).
settings.budgetProviderInvalid: Provider name must be 1–64 safe characters.
settings.budgetTotalInvalid: Totals must be 0 (off) or a USD amount.
settings.budgetUsdInvalid: Limit must be a positive USD amount.
settings.budgetsEnabled: Budget alerts enabled (fires the budgetBreach rule)
settings.budgetsHint: Budgets guard real API spend: Nine-Router provider names (e.g. kimi) plus "openrouter" and "claude-code" (estimated cost — informational for OAuth subscriptions). Warn fires at 80%, critical at 100%, once per day/ISO-week per scope. Provider rows and totals apply on Save budgets.
settings.arulesFlapInvalid: Flap thresholds must be 1–20 consecutive checks and 0–3600 seconds.
settings.arulesHint: Per-rule delivery: enable/disable each alert rule and choose which sink(s) it fires to. "All sinks" routes through every configured sink; webhook event filters still apply.
settings.restartConfirm: Restart the dashboard service now? The dashboard will be unavailable for a few seconds.
settings.restartInfo: Saved. These take effect after a restart:
settings.aboutLine: {license} license — built by Aaron May — based on openclaw-command-center
settings.digestHint: Delivers a compact markdown fleet summary through the alert sinks configured above. No sink checked = all sinks ("*"). Test sends never shift the schedule.
settings.gateExplain: When the gate is ON, new evolution lessons require manual approval before they are adopted; OFF lets lessons auto-approve (autonomous merge).
settings.restartTimeoutAction: The service did not come back — check: systemctl --user status open-fleet-control
